product_overview: Class Tower is a SaaS platform for premium building management that centralizes operations (users, inspections, parcels, occurrences) with secure authentication, audit trails and realtime data. The web app enables operational staff and administrators to register, track and audit workflows via a React + Supabase frontend.
core_goals: Centralize building operational workflows (users, inspections, parcels, occurrences) in a single portal
Eliminate paper processes through digital capture (photos, timestamps) and immutable logs
Ensure security and compliance via Supabase Auth, RBAC and audit trails
Provide fast, mobile-capable interfaces for operational staff with realtime updates

features.name: Authentication & Dashboard
features.description: Secure login and an operational dashboard that displays KPIs and quick links to modules.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard KPIs load
Navigate to / -> Fill email field with invalid password -> Click Login button -> See error message 'Invalid credentials' on login page

features.name: User Management
features.description: Search, create, edit, block/unblock and delete user profiles with role assignment and required deletion reason.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /usuarios -> See user list load -> Search for users by name or unit -> Select user from list -> Click Edit -> Change role field -> Click Save -> See updated role in list
Authenticate and navigate to /usuarios -> Click Create New User -> Fill required fields including role -> Click Save -> See new user appear in list
Authenticate and navigate to /usuarios -> Select user -> Click Block user -> Confirm block -> See user status show 'Blocked'
Authenticate as non-admin -> Navigate to /usuarios -> See access denied or insufficient permissions message
Authenticate and navigate to /usuarios -> Select user -> Click Delete -> Leave reason field empty -> Click Confirm Delete -> See validation error 'Reason is required' shown

features.name: Inspection Management (Vistorias)
features.description: Create, edit, complete and delete technical inspections with photographic evidence and audit tracking.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /vistorias -> Click Register New Inspection -> Fill inspection details -> Upload or capture photo -> Click Save -> See new inspection in list
Authenticate and navigate to /vistorias -> Open existing inspection -> Click Edit -> Modify fields -> Click Save -> See updated inspection and audit entry recorded
Authenticate and navigate to /vistorias -> Open inspection -> Click Mark as Completed -> Confirm completion -> See inspection status set to 'Completed'
Authenticate and navigate to /vistorias -> Open inspection -> Click Delete -> Leave deletion reason empty -> Click Confirm Delete -> See validation error 'Deletion reason required'
Authenticate and navigate to /vistorias -> Click Register New Inspection -> Submit with missing mandatory field -> See field-level validation error and prevent save

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Request a password reset by email and set a new password using the secure token link.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email field -> Click Request Reset -> See confirmation 'Reset email sent' message

Receive reset email and click token link -> Navigate to /reset-password?token=<token> -> Fill new password field -> Fill confirm password field -> Click Reset Password -> See success confirmation and ability to login
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill unknown email -> Click Request Reset -> See generic confirmation message (do not reveal account existence)
Navigate to /reset-password?token=expired_or_invalid -> Fill new password -> Click Reset Password -> See error 'Token invalid or expired' and prompt to request a new link

features.name: Parcel Management (Encomendas)
features.description: Register incoming packages with photo evidence, notify recipients and register pickups with timestamp and operator identity.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /encomendas -> Click Register Package -> Fill recipient and package details -> Upload or capture photo -> Click Save -> See package listed as 'Pending' for recipient

Authenticate and navigate to /encomendas -> Open package entry -> Click Mark as Delivered -> Fill recipient name and confirm -> Click Save -> See package marked as 'Delivered' with timestamp and operator name
Authenticate and navigate to /encomendas -> Click Register Package -> Attempt to Click Save without photo -> See validation error 'Photo required' and prevent submission

features.name: Daily Occurrences (Diário de Bordo)
features.description: Log and view chronological occurrences with categories, automatic attribution to the author and immutable history.
user_flows: Authenticate and navigate to /diario -> Click New Occurrence -> Select category -> Enter description -> Click Save -> See new occurrence appear at top of timeline with timestamp and author
Authenticate and navigate to /diario -> Apply date filter -> See filtered timeline entries
Authenticate and navigate to /diario -> Click New Occurrence -> Leave description empty -> Click Save -> See validation error 'Description is required' and prevent submission

features.name: Audit Logs
features.description: View system-wide audit trail showing table affected, record ID, action (DELETE/UPDATE), user, and before/after values for compliance and troubleshooting.
user_flows: Authenticate as admin and navigate to /audit-logs -> See recent audit entries load -> Click an entry -> See details with before and after data and user who performed the action
Authenticate as admin and navigate to /audit-logs -> Use filters (table, action, date range) -> See filtered results
Authenticate as non-admin -> Navigate to /audit-logs -> See access denied or no data available message

features.name: User Management
features.description: CRUD for users with role-based permissions and blocking capability.
user_interactions: Search for users by name or unit
Create new users with specific roles

features.name: Inspection Management (Vistorias)
features.description: Professional technical report creation with audit tracking.

features.name: Password Recovery
user_interactions: Set new password using token link
